violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. PIC has completed course and is awaiting exam. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2025

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by droppings, nesting material under shelving in the dry storage areas. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 04/06/2026
The small milk cooler was observed in poor repair, observed non-functional at the time of this inspection. PIC stated a work order was placed. New Violation. Correct By: 04/06/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. PIC stated they are scheduled to take class and exam. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025

The dumpster area has an accumulation of unused equipment/furniture/pallets. Dumpster areas must be maintained clean and free of debris to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2024
The refuse area has unused/broken equipment, pallets, and leaf litter. Refuse areas are to be maintained clean to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2024

Reach in freezer located in the kitchen area was not in good repair. PIC reported there is a crack in the condensate line; Inspector observed some ice accumulation as a result of this. PIC stated a work order is in place. New Violation. Correct By: 11/12/2024
The refuse area has unused/broken equipment, pallets, and leaf litter. Refuse areas are to be maintained clean to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the can opener base has an accumulation of debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/25/2023
